name: Pes rotundus episema
mei:
<neume>
  <nc curve="a" />
  <nc intm="u" rellen="l" tilt="ne" >
    <episema form="h" place="above-left" />
  </nc>
</neume>

name: Pes quadratus episema
mei:
<neume>
  <nc tilt="se" />
  <nc intm="u" rellen="l" tilt="ne" >
    <episema form="h" place="above" />
  </nc>
</neume>

name: Pes quassus [oriscus???]
mei:
<neume>
  <nc s-shape="w">
    <oriscus />
  </nc>
  <nc tilt="se" intm="n" /> 
  <nc tilt="ne" rellen="l" intm="u" />
</neume>

name: Pes quassus episema
mei:

  <nc s-shape="w" />
  <nc intm="u" rellen="l" tilt="ne" >

</neume>

mei:

  <nc s-shape="s"/>
  <nc intm="u" rellen="l" tilt="ne" />
